closure_text: Process deviation from a missed cleaning step; 5S audit added to the shift changeover checklist.
Investigation found an out-of-spec torque setting; work instruction WI-755 updated accordingly.
Root cause traced to a mislabeled fixture on line 5; operator retrained and check sheet revised.
Investigation closed same day as opened with identical wording to two other unrelated lots.
Deviation attributed to calibration drift on gauge 90; recalibrated and verified against standard.
Vendor CAPA referenced; corrective action verified on subsequent lots with no recurrence noted.
